metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for the Klair project

plugins.name: klair-staged-reviewer
plugins.description: Code review for staged changes with specialized agents and interactive fix workflow

plugins.name: ping-chat
plugins.description: Post PR review requests to Google Chat with rich cards

plugins.name: pr-review-responder
plugins.description: Assess and respond to PR review comments with deep code analysis and interactive fix workflow

plugins.name: pr-writer
plugins.description: Generate commit messages, PR descriptions, and Linear tickets from branch changes
